jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Blue Beard
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration for "Blue Beard". A young woman, the newest wife, with long flowing auburn hair and a pale, terrified face, peers with wide eyes into a dark, blood-stained closet. She wears an elegant emerald green gown. In her trembling hand, she holds a small ornate golden key, also stained with blood. The closet is filled with the ghostly figures of deceased women in white gowns, their faces obscured. The setting is the end of a long, shadowy gallery with ornate gothic architecture. Warm, soft light streams from a distant window, illuminating dust motes in the air. The overall mood is suspenseful and unsettling, with a fairy tale eeriness. Dominant colors are deep blues, greens, reds, and gold accents.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Cinderella; or, the little glass slipper
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor illustration for a fairy tale book cover of Cinderella. The scene depicts Cinderella in her glittering gown of gold and silver, adorned with jewels, at the royal ball. She is dancing with the Prince in a grand ballroom filled with elegantly dressed nobles in the background. Soft, golden light streams through tall arched windows, illuminating the scene. Cinderella has kind eyes and a gentle smile. The Prince gazes at her adoringly. Her glass slippers sparkle with light. The overall mood is magical and romantic, with warm colors dominating the palette: golds, silvers, creams, soft blues, and pinks. The style should evoke a sense of wonder and enchantment.
